Hero.badge: Vancoillie IT Hulp & Studio, now under one roof
Hero.subtitle: Vancoillie Group brings IT expertise and creative studio services together under one brand, ready for the international market.

Intro.title: Technology that moves people and businesses forward.
Intro.body: Vancoillie Group connects personal IT support, digital product development and entrepreneurship in one growing ecosystem. European at heart, built for what comes next.

Companies.title: Different companies. One quality standard.
Companies.description: Every company has its own specialism and character, strengthened by shared technology, design expertise and long-term thinking.

it.name: Vancoillie IT Hulp
it.label: Human technology
it.title: IT that simply works.
it.body: Personal support at home and remotely for devices, Wi-Fi, networks and everything digital that should feel easier.

studio.name: Vancoillie Studio
studio.label: Digital products
studio.title: From ambition to working product.
studio.body: Websites, apps, software and automation designed as clear, scalable experiences for an international digital world.

Capabilities.title: From the network to the product built on top.
Capabilities.description: Our disciplines are not isolated. They form one technical chain: strategy, design, development, infrastructure and lasting support.

Philosophy.title: Progress only matters when it remains human.

statements.human: Personal service, powered by scalable technology.
statements.secure: Privacy, security and reliability from the first design.
statements.long: Built for real people and the long term.

Innovation.title: We do not just build services. We build the system for future ideas.
Innovation.body: New software products, mobile experiences, platforms and ventures can emerge from the same shared core — considered, modular and ready to grow internationally.

Work.title: Work that makes technology tangible.
Work.description: An extensible showcase for our own products and selected digital trajectories.

support.title: Connected Support
support.description: An accessible support flow connecting local assistance with secure remote support.

platform.title: Digital Product Systems
platform.description: Modular digital foundations for websites, applications and future software products.

International.title: European roots. International ambition.
International.body: We build from Belgium for people, businesses and digital markets without artificial borders. Not by pretending to be everywhere, but by making products and systems internationally usable from day one.

CTA.title: Let’s build what comes next.
CTA.body: A digital product, reliable IT support or a group partnership? Choose the route that fits.

Footer.tagline: A future-focused technology group from Belgium, built around human service and digital products.

Pages.contactTitle: Tell us what you want to build.
Pages.contactBody: Choose the right route and share enough context. We reply personally.
Pages.success: Thank you. Your request is ready for server-side delivery once the form backend is connected.

brands.title: Our companies
brands.body: Discover the companies that form the Vancoillie Group ecosystem.

about.title: Long-term thinking, human technology.
about.body: Vancoillie Group is building a group of dependable technology businesses and digital products from Belgium.

services.title: Capabilities that reinforce each other.
services.body: From personal IT support to international digital product development.

work.title: Selected work
work.body: Digital systems and experiences developed within our growing ecosystem.

vision.title: Built for what comes next.
vision.body: A modular foundation for new products, platforms and ventures.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: This page will be completed when the final legal and processing information becomes available.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: The current site uses no non-essential tracking cookies. This page remains extensible for future consent choices.

terms.title: Terms
terms.body: Final terms and conditions will be published here once legally approved.
